'''sajada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:placemaking|placemaking]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-j-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:placemaking|placemaking]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sajada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæjædæth|sæjædæth]] || [[word:sæjædæj|sæjædæj]] || [[word:sæjædæsh|sæjædæsh]] || [[word:sæjædæ|sæjædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sajajadath|sajajadath]] || [[word:sajajadaj|sajajadaj]] || [[word:sajajadash|sajajadash]] || [[word:sajajada|sajajada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sajadath|sajadath]] || [[word:sajadaj|sajadaj]] || [[word:sajadash|sajadash]] || [[word:sajada|sajada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sajafdath|sajafdath]] || [[word:sajafdaj|sajafdaj]] || [[word:sajafdash|sajafdash]] || [[word:sajafdaf|sajafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sajadatha|sajadatha]] || [[word:sajadaja|sajadaja]] || [[word:sajadasha|sajadasha]] || [[word:sajadaka|sajadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sajadath|sajadath]] || [[word:sajadaj|sajadaj]] || [[word:sajadash|sajadash]] || [[word:sajada|sajada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sajadathal|sajadathal]] || [[word:sajadajal|sajadajal]] || [[word:sajadashal|sajadashal]] || [[word:sajadakal|sajadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sajadathatha|sajadathatha]] || [[word:sajadajaja|sajadajaja]] || [[word:sajadashasha|sajadashasha]] || [[word:sajadaka|sajadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sajadathan|sajadathan]] || [[word:sajadajan|sajadajan]] || [[word:sajadashan|sajadashan]] || [[word:sajadakan|sajadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sajadathaoro|sajadathaoro]] || [[word:sajadajaoro|sajadajaoro]] || [[word:sajadashaoro|sajadashaoro]] || [[word:sajadakaoro|sajadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
